line: <!-- Navigation: entities stay encoded as <, >, ©, and 🌍. -->
“North of the fjord, the sky became violet.”
<input id=name name="observer" type=text required minlength=2 placeholder='Ada Lovelace'>
<label>Visibility <input name=visibility type=range min=0 max="10" step='.5' value=8></label>
<label><input type=checkbox name=verified checked> Verified in person</label>
<textarea id=notes name="notes" rows=3 cols='40'>Colors: green & violet.</textarea>
<svg viewBox="0 0 120 60" width=240 height='120' role=img aria-labelledby="svg-title svg-desc" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
